summary: Backend-only testing for Phase 2 Batch 1 — Intelligent Coaching Upgrades. All 13 tests passed across pain reports, readiness checks, session ratings, and coach chat userId scoping.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/readiness/today uses no upsert/uniqueness constraint — multiple readiness submissions allowed per day (creates multiple docs); the GET returns the first matched. This is acceptable behavior but worth noting.
Pain flag detection: `same_region_count >= 2` before inserting means the 3rd report triggers the flag (count of previous 2). This logic is correct but non-obvious.
Session rating AI uses claude-sonnet via emergentintegrations with fallback — working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created pain reports (3x lower_back_test_region), readiness checks, and session ratings for user_a@theprogram.app
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 Batch 1 coaching endpoints verified working. Pain pattern detection triggers correctly on 3rd same-region report. Readiness endpoint returns adjustmentNote and recommendation. Session rating returns non-empty aiInsight (real AI or fallback). Coach chat userId scoping verified — User A and User B conversations are isolated.
